inputs.label: Leg A Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of first leg of a right triangle (adjacent to the right angle).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of first leg of a right triangle (adjacent to the right angle).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dik üçgenin birinci kenarının uzunluğu (dik açıya bitişik).

inputs.label: Leg B Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of second leg of a right triangle (adjacent to the right angle).

businessContext_i18n.en: Length of second leg of a right triangle (adjacent to the right angle).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dik üçgenin ikinci kenarının uzunluğu (dik açıya bitişik).

inputs.label: Decimal Precision
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the computed hypotenuse.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the computed hypotenuse.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesaplanan hipotenüsün yuvarlanması için ondalık basamak sayısı.

inputs.label: Tolerance (±)
inputs.businessContext: Acceptable tolerance for verifying right triangle when checking existing measurements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Acceptable tolerance for verifying right triangle when checking existing measurements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mevcut ölçümler kontrol edilirken dik üçgeni doğrulamak için kabul edilebilir tolerans.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
